doc_value: The solution is the coefficients of the Laguerre series p that minimizes the sum of the weighted squared errors \[E = \sum_j w_j^2 * |y_j - p(x_j)|^2,\], where the \(w_j\) are the weights. This problem is solved by setting up as the (typically) overdetermined matrix equation \[V(x) * c = w * y,\]
